title: Frontier Justice
writer: George B. Rodney, Scott Darling, Homer King Gordon
actors: Hoot Gibson, Jane Barnes, Richard Cramer
plot: When Brent Halston returns he finds his father in an insane asylum and Wilton about to foreclose on their ranch and bring sheep onto the cattle range. When Wilton kills a rancher, Brent is blamed and jailed. Escaping jail he gets War
